name: Clingons
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine 4 cups marshmallows, peanut butter, and oleo.
3. Microwave on high for 2 minutes or until melted; stir until smooth.
4. Add the remaining ingredients in the following order: marshmallows, Rice Chex, M&Ms, and Corn Chex.
5. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking pan.
7. Bake at high temperature for 2 minutes or until set.
8. Pull apart and enjoy. Refrigerate any leftovers in an airtight container.
